<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeDevices[*]">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeDevices[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>volumeDevice describes a mapping of a raw block device within a container.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeDevices[*].devicePath">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeDevices[*].devicePath</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>devicePath is the path inside of the container that the device will be mapped to.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeDevices[*].name">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeDevices[*].name</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>name must match the name of a persistentVolumeClaim in the pod</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-6">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Pod volumes to mount into the container&rsquo;s filesystem.
Cannot be updated.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts[*]">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>VolumeMount describes a mounting of a Volume within a container.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts[*].mountPath">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts[*].mountPath</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Path within the container at which the volume should be mounted.  Must
not contain &lsquo;:&rsquo;.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts[*].mountPropagation">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts[*].mountPropagation</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>mountPropagation determines how mounts are propagated from the host
to container and the other way around.
When not set, MountPropagationNone is used.
This field is beta in 1.10.
When RecursiveReadOnly is set to IfPossible or to Enabled, MountPropagation must be None or unspecified
(which defaults to None).</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts[*].name">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts[*].name</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>This must match the Name of a Volume.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts[*].readOnly">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts[*].readOnly</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">boolean</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Mounted read-only if true, read-write otherwise (false or unspecified).
Defaults to false.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts[*].recursiveReadOnly">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts[*].recursiveReadOnly</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>RecursiveReadOnly specifies whether read-only mounts should be handled
recursively.</p>

<p>If ReadOnly is false, this field has no meaning and must be unspecified.</p>

<p>If ReadOnly is true, and this field is set to Disabled, the mount is not made
recursively read-only.  If this field is set to IfPossible, the mount is made
recursively read-only, if it is supported by the container runtime.  If this
field is set to Enabled, the mount is made recursively read-only if it is
supported by the container runtime, otherwise the pod will not be started and
an error will be generated to indicate the reason.</p>

<p>If this field is set to IfPossible or Enabled, MountPropagation must be set to
None (or be unspecified, which defaults to None).</p>

<p>If this field is not specified, it is treated as an equivalent of Disabled.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts[*].subPath">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts[*].subPath</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Path within the volume from which the container&rsquo;s volume should be mounted.
Defaults to &ldquo;&rdquo; (volume&rsquo;s root).</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts[*].subPathExpr">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].volumeMounts[*].subPathExpr</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Expanded path within the volume from which the container&rsquo;s volume should be mounted.
Behaves similarly to SubPath but environment variable references $(VAR_NAME) are expanded using the container&rsquo;s environment.
Defaults to &ldquo;&rdquo; (volume&rsquo;s root).
SubPathExpr and SubPath are mutually exclusive.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-6">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].workingDir">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.containers[*].workingDir</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Container&rsquo;s working directory.
If not specified, the container runtime&rsquo;s default will be used, which
might be configured in the container image.
Cannot be updated.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-4">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Envs defines environment variables for Kafka broker Pods.
Adding the &ldquo;+&rdquo; prefix to the name prepends the value to that environment variable instead of overwriting it.
Add the &ldquo;+&rdquo; suffix to append.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-5">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*]">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>EnvVar represents an environment variable present in a Container.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-6">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].name">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].name</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Name of the environment variable.
May consist of any printable ASCII characters except &lsquo;=&rsquo;.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-6">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].value">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].value</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Variable references $(VAR_NAME) are expanded
using the previously defined environment variables in the container and
any service environment variables. If a variable cannot be resolved,
the reference in the input string will be unchanged. Double $$ are reduced
to a single $, which allows for escaping the $(VAR_NAME) syntax: i.e.
&ldquo;$$(VAR_NAME)&rdquo; will produce the string literal &ldquo;$(VAR_NAME)&rdquo;.
Escaped references will never be expanded, regardless of whether the variable
exists or not.
Defaults to &ldquo;&rdquo;.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-6">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Source for the environment variable&rsquo;s value. Cannot be used if value is not empty.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.configMapKeyRef">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.configMapKeyRef</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Selects a key of a ConfigMap.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.configMapKeyRef.key">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.configMapKeyRef.key</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>The key to select.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.configMapKeyRef.name">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.configMapKeyRef.name</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Name of the referent.
This field is effectively required, but due to backwards compatibility is
allowed to be empty. Instances of this type with an empty value here are
almost certainly wrong.
More info: <a href="https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#names">https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#names</a></p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.configMapKeyRef.optional">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.configMapKeyRef.optional</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">boolean</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Specify whether the ConfigMap or its key must be defined</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.fieldRef">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.fieldRef</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Selects a field of the pod: supports metadata.name, metadata.namespace, <code>metadata.labels['&lt;KEY&gt;']</code>, <code>metadata.annotations['&lt;KEY&gt;']</code>,
spec.nodeName, spec.serviceAccountName, status.hostIP, status.podIP, status.podIPs.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.fieldRef.apiVersion">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.fieldRef.apiVersion</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Version of the schema the FieldPath is written in terms of, defaults to &ldquo;v1&rdquo;.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.fieldRef.fieldPath">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.fieldRef.fieldPath</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Path of the field to select in the specified API version.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>FileKeyRef selects a key of the env file.
Requires the EnvFiles feature gate to be enabled.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef.key">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef.key</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>The key within the env file. An invalid key will prevent the pod from starting.
The keys defined within a source may consist of any printable ASCII characters except &lsquo;=&rsquo;.
During Alpha stage of the EnvFiles feature gate, the key size is limited to 128 characters.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef.optional">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef.optional</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">boolean</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Specify whether the file or its key must be defined. If the file or key
does not exist, then the env var is not published.
If optional is set to true and the specified key does not exist,
the environment variable will not be set in the Pod&rsquo;s containers.</p>

<p>If optional is set to false and the specified key does not exist,
an error will be returned during Pod creation.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef.path">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef.path</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>The path within the volume from which to select the file.
Must be relative and may not contain the &lsquo;..&rsquo; path or start with &lsquo;..&rsquo;.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef.volumeName">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef.volumeName</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>The name of the volume mount containing the env file.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Selects a resource of the container: only resources limits and requests
(limits.cpu, limits.memory, limits.ephemeral-storage, requests.cpu, requests.memory and requests.ephemeral-storage) are currently supported.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.containerName">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.containerName</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Container name: required for volumes, optional for env vars</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.divisor">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.divisor</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">


</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Specifies the output format of the exposed resources, defaults to &ldquo;1&rdquo;</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.resource">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.resource</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Required: resource to select</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.secretKeyRef">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.secretKeyRef</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Selects a key of a secret in the pod&rsquo;s namespace</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.secretKeyRef.key">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.secretKeyRef.key</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>The key of the secret to select from.  Must be a valid secret key.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.secretKeyRef.name">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.secretKeyRef.name</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Name of the referent.
This field is effectively required, but due to backwards compatibility is
allowed to be empty. Instances of this type with an empty value here are
almost certainly wrong.
More info: <a href="https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#names">https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#names</a></p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.secretKeyRef.optional">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.envs[*].valueFrom.secretKeyRef.optional</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">boolean</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Specify whether the Secret or its key must be defined</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-4">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.image">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.image</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-4">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.imagePullSecrets">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.imagePullSecrets</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-5">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.imagePullSecrets[*]">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.imagePullSecrets[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>LocalObjectReference contains enough information to let you locate the
referenced object inside the same namespace.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-6">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.imagePullSecrets[*].name">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.imagePullSecrets[*].name</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Name of the referent.
This field is effectively required, but due to backwards compatibility is
allowed to be empty. Instances of this type with an empty value here are
almost certainly wrong.
More info: <a href="https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#names">https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#names</a></p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-4">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>InitContainers add extra initContainers to the Kafka broker pod</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-5">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*]">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>A single application container that you want to run within a pod.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-6">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].args">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].args</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Arguments to the entrypoint.
The container image&rsquo;s CMD is used if this is not provided.
Variable references $(VAR_NAME) are expanded using the container&rsquo;s environment. If a variable
cannot be resolved, the reference in the input string will be unchanged. Double $$ are reduced
to a single $, which allows for escaping the $(VAR_NAME) syntax: i.e. &ldquo;$$(VAR_NAME)&rdquo; will
produce the string literal &ldquo;$(VAR_NAME)&rdquo;. Escaped references will never be expanded, regardless
of whether the variable exists or not. Cannot be updated.
More info: <a href="https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/inject-data-application/define-command-argument-container/#running-a-command-in-a-shell">https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/inject-data-application/define-command-argument-container/#running-a-command-in-a-shell</a></p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].args[*]">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].args[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-6">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].command">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].command</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Entrypoint array. Not executed within a shell.
The container image&rsquo;s ENTRYPOINT is used if this is not provided.
Variable references $(VAR_NAME) are expanded using the container&rsquo;s environment. If a variable
cannot be resolved, the reference in the input string will be unchanged. Double $$ are reduced
to a single $, which allows for escaping the $(VAR_NAME) syntax: i.e. &ldquo;$$(VAR_NAME)&rdquo; will
produce the string literal &ldquo;$(VAR_NAME)&rdquo;. Escaped references will never be expanded, regardless
of whether the variable exists or not. Cannot be updated.
More info: <a href="https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/inject-data-application/define-command-argument-container/#running-a-command-in-a-shell">https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/inject-data-application/define-command-argument-container/#running-a-command-in-a-shell</a></p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].command[*]">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].command[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-6">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>List of environment variables to set in the container.
Cannot be updated.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-6">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>List of sources to populate environment variables in the container.
The keys defined within a source may consist of any printable ASCII characters except &lsquo;=&rsquo;.
When a key exists in multiple
sources, the value associated with the last source will take precedence.
Values defined by an Env with a duplicate key will take precedence.
Cannot be updated.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom[*]">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>EnvFromSource represents the source of a set of ConfigMaps or Secrets</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom[*].configMapRef">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom[*].configMapRef</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>The ConfigMap to select from</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom[*].configMapRef.name">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom[*].configMapRef.name</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Name of the referent.
This field is effectively required, but due to backwards compatibility is
allowed to be empty. Instances of this type with an empty value here are
almost certainly wrong.
More info: <a href="https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#names">https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#names</a></p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom[*].configMapRef.optional">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom[*].configMapRef.optional</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">boolean</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Specify whether the ConfigMap must be defined</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom[*].prefix">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom[*].prefix</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Optional text to prepend to the name of each environment variable.
May consist of any printable ASCII characters except &lsquo;=&rsquo;.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom[*].secretRef">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom[*].secretRef</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>The Secret to select from</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom[*].secretRef.name">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom[*].secretRef.name</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Name of the referent.
This field is effectively required, but due to backwards compatibility is
allowed to be empty. Instances of this type with an empty value here are
almost certainly wrong.
More info: <a href="https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#names">https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#names</a></p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom[*].secretRef.optional">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].envFrom[*].secretRef.optional</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">boolean</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Specify whether the Secret must be defined</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*]">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>EnvVar represents an environment variable present in a Container.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].name">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].name</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Name of the environment variable.
May consist of any printable ASCII characters except &lsquo;=&rsquo;.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].value">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].value</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Variable references $(VAR_NAME) are expanded
using the previously defined environment variables in the container and
any service environment variables. If a variable cannot be resolved,
the reference in the input string will be unchanged. Double $$ are reduced
to a single $, which allows for escaping the $(VAR_NAME) syntax: i.e.
&ldquo;$$(VAR_NAME)&rdquo; will produce the string literal &ldquo;$(VAR_NAME)&rdquo;.
Escaped references will never be expanded, regardless of whether the variable
exists or not.
Defaults to &ldquo;&rdquo;.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Source for the environment variable&rsquo;s value. Cannot be used if value is not empty.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.configMapKeyRef">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.configMapKeyRef</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Selects a key of a ConfigMap.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.configMapKeyRef.key">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.configMapKeyRef.key</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>The key to select.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.configMapKeyRef.name">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.configMapKeyRef.name</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Name of the referent.
This field is effectively required, but due to backwards compatibility is
allowed to be empty. Instances of this type with an empty value here are
almost certainly wrong.
More info: <a href="https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#names">https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#names</a></p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.configMapKeyRef.optional">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.configMapKeyRef.optional</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">boolean</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Specify whether the ConfigMap or its key must be defined</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.fieldRef">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.fieldRef</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Selects a field of the pod: supports metadata.name, metadata.namespace, <code>metadata.labels['&lt;KEY&gt;']</code>, <code>metadata.annotations['&lt;KEY&gt;']</code>,
spec.nodeName, spec.serviceAccountName, status.hostIP, status.podIP, status.podIPs.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.fieldRef.apiVersion">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.fieldRef.apiVersion</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Version of the schema the FieldPath is written in terms of, defaults to &ldquo;v1&rdquo;.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.fieldRef.fieldPath">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.fieldRef.fieldPath</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Path of the field to select in the specified API version.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>FileKeyRef selects a key of the env file.
Requires the EnvFiles feature gate to be enabled.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef.key">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef.key</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>The key within the env file. An invalid key will prevent the pod from starting.
The keys defined within a source may consist of any printable ASCII characters except &lsquo;=&rsquo;.
During Alpha stage of the EnvFiles feature gate, the key size is limited to 128 characters.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef.optional">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef.optional</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">boolean</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Specify whether the file or its key must be defined. If the file or key
does not exist, then the env var is not published.
If optional is set to true and the specified key does not exist,
the environment variable will not be set in the Pod&rsquo;s containers.</p>

<p>If optional is set to false and the specified key does not exist,
an error will be returned during Pod creation.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef.path">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef.path</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>The path within the volume from which to select the file.
Must be relative and may not contain the &lsquo;..&rsquo; path or start with &lsquo;..&rsquo;.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef.volumeName">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.fileKeyRef.volumeName</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>The name of the volume mount containing the env file.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Selects a resource of the container: only resources limits and requests
(limits.cpu, limits.memory, limits.ephemeral-storage, requests.cpu, requests.memory and requests.ephemeral-storage) are currently supported.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.containerName">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.containerName</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Container name: required for volumes, optional for env vars</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.divisor">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.divisor</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">


</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Specifies the output format of the exposed resources, defaults to &ldquo;1&rdquo;</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.resource">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.resource</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Required: resource to select</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.secretKeyRef">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.secretKeyRef</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Selects a key of a secret in the pod&rsquo;s namespace</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.secretKeyRef.key">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.secretKeyRef.key</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>The key of the secret to select from.  Must be a valid secret key.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.secretKeyRef.name">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.secretKeyRef.name</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Name of the referent.
This field is effectively required, but due to backwards compatibility is
allowed to be empty. Instances of this type with an empty value here are
almost certainly wrong.
More info: <a href="https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#names">https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#names</a></p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.secretKeyRef.optional">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].env[*].valueFrom.secretKeyRef.optional</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">boolean</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Specify whether the Secret or its key must be defined</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-6">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].image">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].image</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Container image name.
More info: <a href="https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/containers/images">https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/containers/images</a>
This field is optional to allow higher level config management to default or override
container images in workload controllers like Deployments and StatefulSets.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-6">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].imagePullPolicy">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].imagePullPolicy</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Image pull policy.
One of Always, Never, IfNotPresent.
Defaults to Always if :latest tag is specified, or IfNotPresent otherwise.
Cannot be updated.
More info: <a href="https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/containers/images#updating-images">https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/containers/images#updating-images</a></p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-6">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Actions that the management system should take in response to container lifecycle events.
Cannot be updated.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>PostStart is called immediately after a container is created. If the handler fails,
the container is terminated and restarted according to its restart policy.
Other management of the container blocks until the hook completes.
More info: <a href="https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/containers/container-lifecycle-hooks/#container-hooks">https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/containers/container-lifecycle-hooks/#container-hooks</a></p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.exec">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.exec</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Exec specifies a command to execute in the container.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.exec.command">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.exec.command</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Command is the command line to execute inside the container, the working directory for the
command  is root (&lsquo;/&rsquo;) in the container&rsquo;s filesystem. The command is simply exec&rsquo;d, it is
not run inside a shell, so traditional shell instructions (&lsquo;|&rsquo;, etc) won&rsquo;t work. To use
a shell, you need to explicitly call out to that shell.
Exit status of 0 is treated as live/healthy and non-zero is unhealthy.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.exec.command[*]">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.exec.command[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>HTTPGet specifies an HTTP GET request to perform.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet.host">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet.host</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Host name to connect to, defaults to the pod IP. You probably want to set
&ldquo;Host&rdquo; in httpHeaders instead.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet.httpHeaders">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet.httpHeaders</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Custom headers to set in the request. HTTP allows repeated headers.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet.httpHeaders[*]">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet.httpHeaders[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>HTTPHeader describes a custom header to be used in HTTP probes</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-11">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet.httpHeaders[*].name">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet.httpHeaders[*].name</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>The header field name.
This will be canonicalized upon output, so case-variant names will be understood as the same header.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-11">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet.httpHeaders[*].value">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet.httpHeaders[*].value</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>The header field value</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet.path">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet.path</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Path to access on the HTTP server.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet.port">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet.port</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">

<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Name or number of the port to access on the container.
Number must be in the range 1 to 65535.
Name must be an IANA_SVC_NAME.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet.scheme">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.httpGet.scheme</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Scheme to use for connecting to the host.
Defaults to HTTP.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.sleep">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.sleep</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Sleep represents a duration that the container should sleep.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.sleep.seconds">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.sleep.seconds</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">integer</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Seconds is the number of seconds to sleep.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.tcpSocket">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.tcpSocket</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Deprecated. TCPSocket is NOT supported as a LifecycleHandler and kept
for backward compatibility. There is no validation of this field and
lifecycle hooks will fail at runtime when it is specified.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.tcpSocket.host">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.tcpSocket.host</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Optional: Host name to connect to, defaults to the pod IP.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.tcpSocket.port">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.postStart.tcpSocket.port</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">

<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Number or name of the port to access on the container.
Number must be in the range 1 to 65535.
Name must be an IANA_SVC_NAME.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>PreStop is called immediately before a container is terminated due to an
API request or management event such as liveness/startup probe failure,
preemption, resource contention, etc. The handler is not called if the
container crashes or exits. The Pod&rsquo;s termination grace period countdown begins before the
PreStop hook is executed. Regardless of the outcome of the handler, the
container will eventually terminate within the Pod&rsquo;s termination grace
period (unless delayed by finalizers). Other management of the container blocks until the hook completes
or until the termination grace period is reached.
More info: <a href="https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/containers/container-lifecycle-hooks/#container-hooks">https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/containers/container-lifecycle-hooks/#container-hooks</a></p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.exec">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.exec</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Exec specifies a command to execute in the container.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.exec.command">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.exec.command</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Command is the command line to execute inside the container, the working directory for the
command  is root (&lsquo;/&rsquo;) in the container&rsquo;s filesystem. The command is simply exec&rsquo;d, it is
not run inside a shell, so traditional shell instructions (&lsquo;|&rsquo;, etc) won&rsquo;t work. To use
a shell, you need to explicitly call out to that shell.
Exit status of 0 is treated as live/healthy and non-zero is unhealthy.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.exec.command[*]">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.exec.command[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>HTTPGet specifies an HTTP GET request to perform.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet.host">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet.host</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Host name to connect to, defaults to the pod IP. You probably want to set
&ldquo;Host&rdquo; in httpHeaders instead.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet.httpHeaders">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet.httpHeaders</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Custom headers to set in the request. HTTP allows repeated headers.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet.httpHeaders[*]">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet.httpHeaders[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>HTTPHeader describes a custom header to be used in HTTP probes</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-11">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet.httpHeaders[*].name">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet.httpHeaders[*].name</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>The header field name.
This will be canonicalized upon output, so case-variant names will be understood as the same header.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-11">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet.httpHeaders[*].value">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet.httpHeaders[*].value</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>The header field value</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet.path">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet.path</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Path to access on the HTTP server.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet.port">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet.port</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">

<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Name or number of the port to access on the container.
Number must be in the range 1 to 65535.
Name must be an IANA_SVC_NAME.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet.scheme">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.httpGet.scheme</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Scheme to use for connecting to the host.
Defaults to HTTP.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.sleep">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.sleep</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Sleep represents a duration that the container should sleep.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.sleep.seconds">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.sleep.seconds</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">integer</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Seconds is the number of seconds to sleep.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.tcpSocket">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.tcpSocket</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Deprecated. TCPSocket is NOT supported as a LifecycleHandler and kept
for backward compatibility. There is no validation of this field and
lifecycle hooks will fail at runtime when it is specified.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.tcpSocket.host">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.tcpSocket.host</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Optional: Host name to connect to, defaults to the pod IP.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.tcpSocket.port">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.preStop.tcpSocket.port</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">

<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Number or name of the port to access on the container.
Number must be in the range 1 to 65535.
Name must be an IANA_SVC_NAME.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.stopSignal">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].lifecycle.stopSignal</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>StopSignal defines which signal will be sent to a container when it is being stopped.
If not specified, the default is defined by the container runtime in use.
StopSignal can only be set for Pods with a non-empty .spec.os.name</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-6">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Periodic probe of container liveness.
Container will be restarted if the probe fails.
Cannot be updated.
More info: <a href="https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/pods/pod-lifecycle#container-probes">https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/pods/pod-lifecycle#container-probes</a></p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.exec">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.exec</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Exec specifies a command to execute in the container.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.exec.command">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.exec.command</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Command is the command line to execute inside the container, the working directory for the
command  is root (&lsquo;/&rsquo;) in the container&rsquo;s filesystem. The command is simply exec&rsquo;d, it is
not run inside a shell, so traditional shell instructions (&lsquo;|&rsquo;, etc) won&rsquo;t work. To use
a shell, you need to explicitly call out to that shell.
Exit status of 0 is treated as live/healthy and non-zero is unhealthy.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.exec.command[*]">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.exec.command[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.failureThreshold">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.failureThreshold</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">integer</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Minimum consecutive failures for the probe to be considered failed after having succeeded.
Defaults to 3. Minimum value is 1.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.grpc">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.grpc</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>GRPC specifies a GRPC HealthCheckRequest.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.grpc.port">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.grpc.port</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">integer</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Port number of the gRPC service. Number must be in the range 1 to 65535.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.grpc.service">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.grpc.service</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Service is the name of the service to place in the gRPC HealthCheckRequest
(see <a href="https://github.com/grpc/grpc/blob/master/doc/health-checking.md">https://github.com/grpc/grpc/blob/master/doc/health-checking.md</a>).</p>

<p>If this is not specified, the default behavior is defined by gRPC.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-7">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.httpGet">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.httpGet</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>HTTPGet specifies an HTTP GET request to perform.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.httpGet.host">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.httpGet.host</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Host name to connect to, defaults to the pod IP. You probably want to set
&ldquo;Host&rdquo; in httpHeaders instead.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-8">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.httpGet.httpHeaders">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.httpGet.httpHeaders</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Custom headers to set in the request. HTTP allows repeated headers.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-9">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.httpGet.httpHeaders[*]">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.httpGet.httpHeaders[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>HTTPHeader describes a custom header to be used in HTTP probes</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.httpGet.httpHeaders[*].name">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.httpGet.httpHeaders[*].name</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>The header field name.
This will be canonicalized upon output, so case-variant names will be understood as the same header.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-10">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.httpGet.httpHeaders[*].value">.spec.brokers[*].brokerConfig.initContainers[*].livenessProbe.httpGet.httpHeaders[*].value</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
