allowed to be empty. Instances of this type with an empty value here are
almost certainly wrong.
More info: <a href="https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#names">https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#names</a></p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-4">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.listenersConfig.internalListeners[*].sslClientAuth">.spec.listenersConfig.internalListeners[*].sslClientAuth</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>SSLClientAuth specifies whether client authentication is required, requested, or not required.
This field defaults to &ldquo;required&rdquo; if it is omitted</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-4">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.listenersConfig.internalListeners[*].type">.spec.listenersConfig.internalListeners[*].type</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>SecurityProtocol is the protocol used to communicate with brokers.
Valid values are: plaintext, ssl, sasl_plaintext, sasl_ssl.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-4">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.listenersConfig.internalListeners[*].usedForControllerCommunication">.spec.listenersConfig.internalListeners[*].usedForControllerCommunication</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">boolean</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-4">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.listenersConfig.internalListeners[*].usedForInnerBrokerCommunication">.spec.listenersConfig.internalListeners[*].usedForInnerBrokerCommunication</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">boolean</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>At least one of the listeners should have this flag enabled</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-4">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.listenersConfig.internalListeners[*].usedForKafkaAdminCommunication">.spec.listenersConfig.internalListeners[*].usedForKafkaAdminCommunication</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">boolean</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>UsedForKafkaAdminCommunication allows for a different port to be returned when the koperator is checking for the port to use to check if kafka is operating.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-2">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.listenersConfig.serviceAnnotations">.spec.listenersConfig.serviceAnnotations</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-2">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets">.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>SSLSecrets defines the Kafka SSL secrets</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-3">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets.create">.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets.create</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">boolean</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-3">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets.issuerRef">.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets.issuerRef</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>IssuerReference is a reference to a certificate issuer object with a given name, kind and group.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-4">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets.issuerRef.group">.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets.issuerRef.group</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Group of the issuer being referred to.
Defaults to &lsquo;cert-manager.io&rsquo;.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-4">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets.issuerRef.kind">.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets.issuerRef.kind</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Kind of the issuer being referred to.
Defaults to &lsquo;Issuer&rsquo;.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-4">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets.issuerRef.name">.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets.issuerRef.name</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Name of the issuer being referred to.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-3">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets.jksPasswordName">.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets.jksPasswordName</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-3">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets.pkiBackend">.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets.pkiBackend</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>PKIBackend represents an interface implementing the PKIManager</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-3">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets.tlsSecretName">.spec.listenersConfig.sslSecrets.tlsSecretName</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.localDebugEnabled">.spec.localDebugEnabled</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">boolean</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>localDebugEnabled is used to decide whether to create a separate loadbalancer services for the
Kafka and Cruise Control Pods. These services will expose the internal listener ports of the Kafka
cluster with LoadBalancer type, which can be used for running Koperator on a local machine against
a kafkaCluster instance on a Kind Cluster.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.monitoringConfig">.spec.monitoringConfig</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>MonitoringConfig defines the config for monitoring Kafka and Cruise Control</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-2">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.monitoringConfig.cCJMXExporterConfig">.spec.monitoringConfig.cCJMXExporterConfig</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-2">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.monitoringConfig.jmxImage">.spec.monitoringConfig.jmxImage</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-2">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.monitoringConfig.kafkaJMXExporterConfig">.spec.monitoringConfig.kafkaJMXExporterConfig</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-2">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.monitoringConfig.pathToJar">.spec.monitoringConfig.pathToJar</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.oneBrokerPerNode">.spec.oneBrokerPerNode</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">boolean</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>If true OneBrokerPerNode ensures that each kafka broker will be placed on a different node unless a custom
Affinity definition overrides this behavior</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.propagateLabels">.spec.propagateLabels</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">boolean</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.rackAwareness">.spec.rackAwareness</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>RackAwareness defines the required fields to enable kafka&rsquo;s rack aware feature</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-2">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.rackAwareness.labels">.spec.rackAwareness.labels</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-3">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.rackAwareness.labels[*]">.spec.rackAwareness.labels[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.readOnlyConfig">.spec.readOnlyConfig</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.removeUnusedIngressResources">.spec.removeUnusedIngressResources</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">boolean</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>RemoveUnusedIngressResources when true, the unnecessary resources from the previous ingress state will be removed.
when false, they will be kept so the Kafka cluster remains available for those Kafka clients which are still using the previous ingress setting.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.rollingUpgradeConfig">.spec.rollingUpgradeConfig</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>RollingUpgradeConfig defines the desired config of the RollingUpgrade</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-2">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.rollingUpgradeConfig.concurrentBrokerRestartCountPerRack">.spec.rollingUpgradeConfig.concurrentBrokerRestartCountPerRack</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">integer</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>ConcurrentBrokerRestartCountPerRack controls how many brokers can be restarted in parallel during a rolling upgrade. If
it is set to a value greater than 1, the operator will restart up to that amount of brokers in parallel, if the
brokers are within the same rack (as specified by &ldquo;broker.rack&rdquo; in broker read-only configs). Since using Kafka broker
racks spreads out the replicas, we know that restarting multiple brokers in the same rack will not cause more than
1/Nth of the replicas of a topic-partition to be unavailable at the same time, where N is the number of racks used.
This is a safe way to speed up the rolling upgrade. Note that for the rack distribution explained above, Cruise Control
requires <code>com.linkedin.kafka.cruisecontrol.analyzer.goals.RackAwareDistributionGoal</code> to be configured. Default value is 1.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-2">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.rollingUpgradeConfig.failureThreshold">.spec.rollingUpgradeConfig.failureThreshold</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">integer</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>FailureThreshold controls how many failures the cluster can tolerate during a rolling upgrade. Once the number of
failures reaches this threshold a rolling upgrade flow stops. The number of failures is computed as the sum of
distinct broker replicas with either offline replicas or out of sync replicas and the number of alerts triggered by
alerts with &lsquo;rollingupgrade&rsquo;</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.taintedBrokersSelector">.spec.taintedBrokersSelector</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>Selector for broker pods that need to be recycled/reconciled</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-2">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.taintedBrokersSelector.matchExpressions">.spec.taintedBrokersSelector.matchExpressions</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>matchExpressions is a list of label selector requirements. The requirements are ANDed.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-3">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.taintedBrokersSelector.matchExpressions[*]">.spec.taintedBrokersSelector.matchExpressions[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>A label selector requirement is a selector that contains values, a key, and an operator that
relates the key and values.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-4">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.taintedBrokersSelector.matchExpressions[*].key">.spec.taintedBrokersSelector.matchExpressions[*].key</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>key is the label key that the selector applies to.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-4">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.taintedBrokersSelector.matchExpressions[*].operator">.spec.taintedBrokersSelector.matchExpressions[*].operator</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>operator represents a key&rsquo;s relationship to a set of values.
Valid operators are In, NotIn, Exists and DoesNotExist.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-4">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.taintedBrokersSelector.matchExpressions[*].values">.spec.taintedBrokersSelector.matchExpressions[*].values</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>values is an array of string values. If the operator is In or NotIn,
the values array must be non-empty. If the operator is Exists or DoesNotExist,
the values array must be empty. This array is replaced during a strategic
merge patch.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-5">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.taintedBrokersSelector.matchExpressions[*].values[*]">.spec.taintedBrokersSelector.matchExpressions[*].values[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-2">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.taintedBrokersSelector.matchLabels">.spec.taintedBrokersSelector.matchLabels</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>matchLabels is a map of {key,value} pairs. A single {key,value} in the matchLabels
map is equivalent to an element of matchExpressions, whose key field is &ldquo;key&rdquo;, the
operator is &ldquo;In&rdquo;, and the values array contains only &ldquo;value&rdquo;. The requirements are ANDed.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.zkAddresses">.spec.zkAddresses</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">array</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>ZKAddresses specifies the ZooKeeper connection string
in the form hostname:port where host and port are the host and port of a ZooKeeper server.
Under ZooKeeper mode, this is a must-have configuration.
And if set under KRaft mode, Koperator ignores this configuration.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-2">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.zkAddresses[*]">.spec.zkAddresses[*]</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.spec.zkPath">.spec.zkPath</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>ZKPath specifies the ZooKeeper chroot path as part
of its ZooKeeper connection string which puts its data under some path in the global ZooKeeper namespace.
If set under KRaft mode, Koperator ignores this configuration.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-0">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.status">.status</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>KafkaClusterStatus defines the observed state of KafkaCluster</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.status.alertCount">.status.alertCount</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">integer</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.status.brokersState">.status.brokersState</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.status.clusterID">.status.clusterID</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>ClusterID is a base64-encoded random UUID generated by Koperator to run the Kafka cluster in KRaft mode</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.status.cruiseControlTopicStatus">.status.cruiseControlTopicStatus</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>CruiseControlTopicStatus holds info about the CC topic status</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.status.listenerStatuses">.status.listenerStatuses</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>ListenerStatuses holds information about the statuses of the configured listeners.
The internal and external listeners are stored in separate maps, and each listener can be looked up by name.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-2">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.status.listenerStatuses.externalListeners">.status.listenerStatuses.externalListeners</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-2">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.status.listenerStatuses.internalListeners">.status.listenerStatuses.internalListeners</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.status.rollingUpgradeStatus">.status.rollingUpgradeStatus</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">object</span>

</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>RollingUpgradeStatus defines status of rolling upgrade</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-2">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.status.rollingUpgradeStatus.errorCount">.status.rollingUpgradeStatus.errorCount</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">integer</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>ErrorCount keeps track the number of errors reported by alerts labeled with &lsquo;rollingupgrade&rsquo;.
It&rsquo;s reset once these alerts stop firing.</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-2">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.status.rollingUpgradeStatus.lastSuccess">.status.rollingUpgradeStatus.lastSuccess</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="property depth-1">
<div class="property-header">
<h3 class="property-path" id="v1beta1-.status.state">.status.state</h3>
</div>
<div class="property-body">
<div class="property-meta">
<span class="property-type">string</span>
<span class="property-required">Required</span>
</div>

<div class="property-description">
<p>ClusterState holds info about the cluster state</p>

</div>

</div>
</div>





</div>
